speaker: speaker1
text: May I see your passport , please ?

speaker: speaker1
text: You are here on business , I think ?

speaker: speaker2
text: That's right . A German company has invited me for business talks .

speaker: speaker1
text: How long will you be staying ?

speaker: speaker1
text: How many pieces of baggage have you got ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Only one . In this case , I have a camera .

speaker: speaker1
text: Do you intend to take it out on your departure ?

speaker: speaker1
text: According to the regulations , the camera you've brought along for personal use can be passed for the time being duty free , but you will have to take it out with you when you leave the country .

speaker: speaker1
text: Well . Have a pleasant stay in Germany .
